posts.author: chrisgilldc (Chris Gill)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good morning, all!

I’ve been starting to work with the Zendesk integrations and it appears there’s no way to manually link existing tickets against items, short of using some Python code to create new items from existing tickets.

Is there a way to do this in the interface?

Thanks!

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @chrisgilldc, welcome to the community!

Just to make sure we’re on the same page-- you’re hoping to push existing Zendesk tickets into your monday.com board, is that right?

If so, I see that we do have three recipes for tickets that are already in ZD/have been submitted already:

image1568×526 50.6 KB
image802×526 24.9 KB

Would any of these work for your use-case?

Let me know if I misunderstood-- happy to continue digging into this with you.

-Helen

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
